background: In the cholesterol illustrative example, we aim to determine the minimal detectable difference using a sample size of n=30 per group, with a significance level of α=0.05 (two-sided) and a power of 0.90. A reasonable estimate for σ² has been established as 0.25.

task.query: What is the minimal detectable difference?
task.answer: Δ=√(2⋅σ²/n)(z₁₋β+z₁₋α/₂)=√(2⋅0.25/30)(1.282+1.96)=0.42. This study will be able to detect a mean difference of 0.42 mmol/L under the stated conditions.
task.method: 达到指定概率所需的最小样本量
